rationale: Educ. Code §19.009 governs Windham School District employee salaries, certification, and benefits. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so the proposed change creates no conflict.
quote: The board may establish personnel policies as necessary to ensure the effective and efficient operation of the district.
_note: No provision in §19.009 references property tax exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b). Indirect fiscal effects on district revenue are not a direct statutory conflict.
